name: @waishnav/devspace
description: Expose a secure local coding workspace through an MCP server.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:app && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test: tsx src/ec2-control.test.ts && tsx src/no-codex.test.ts && tsx src/google-ai-key-pool.test.ts && tsx src/config.test.ts && tsx src/shell-environment.test.ts && tsx src/runtime-operations.test.ts && tsx src/usage-meter.test.ts && tsx src/chat-progress.test.ts && tsx src/job-store.test.ts && tsx src/job-runner.test.ts && tsx src/computer-use.test.ts && tsx src/browser-computer.test.ts && tsx src/browser-task-loop.test.ts && tsx src/pi-tools.test.ts && tsx src/skill-matcher.test.ts && tsx src/compound-tools.test.ts && tsx src/design-audit.test.ts && tsx src/register-v11-tools.test.ts && tsx src/ui/card-types.test.ts && tsx src/ui/patch-display.test.ts && tsx src/apply-patch.test.ts && tsx src/process-platform.test.ts && tsx src/process-sessions.test.ts && tsx src/local-agent-runtime.test.ts && tsx src/local-agent-adapters.test.ts && tsx src/local-agent-availability.test.ts && tsx src/local-agent-profiles.test.ts && tsx src/local-agent-targets.test.ts && tsx src/local-agent-store.test.ts && tsx src/roots.test.ts && tsx src/skills.test.ts && tsx src/workspaces.test.ts && tsx src/review-checkpoints.test.ts && tsx src/oauth-store.test.ts && tsx src/cli.test.ts
scripts.test:runtime: tsx src/shell-environment.test.ts && tsx src/runtime-operations.test.ts && tsx src/usage-meter.test.ts
